tiles.title: Connected Clusters
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT server) AS value FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name = 'argocd_cluster_connection_status' AND data_point_value = 1 AND p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes'

tiles.title: Kubectl Retries
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(data_point_value), 0) AS value FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name = 'argocd_kubectl_request_retries_total' AND p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes'

tiles.title: Applications by Health
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(health_status, 'unknown') AS health_status, COUNT(DISTINCT name) AS apps FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name = 'argocd_app_info' AND p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes' GROUP BY health_status ORDER BY apps DESC

tiles.title: Applications by Sync Status
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(sync_status, 'unknown') AS sync_status, COUNT(DISTINCT name) AS apps FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name = 'argocd_app_info' AND p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes' GROUP BY sync_status ORDER BY apps DESC

tiles.title: Applications by Project
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(project, 'unknown') AS project, COUNT(DISTINCT name) AS apps FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name = 'argocd_app_info' AND p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes' GROUP BY project ORDER BY apps DESC LIMIT 20

tiles.title: Applications by Destination Namespace
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(dest_namespace, 'unknown') AS dest_namespace, COUNT(DISTINCT name) AS apps FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name = 'argocd_app_info' AND p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes' GROUP BY dest_namespace ORDER BY apps DESC LIMIT 20

tiles.title: Out Of Sync Applications
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT name, project, repo, dest_namespace, health_status, sync_status, MAX(p_timestamp) AS last_seen FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name = 'argocd_app_info' AND sync_status <> 'Synced' AND p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes' GROUP BY name, project, repo, dest_namespace, health_status, sync_status ORDER BY last_seen DESC

tiles.title: Apps with Orphaned Resources
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT name, namespace, project, SUM(data_point_value) AS orphaned_resources, MAX(p_timestamp) AS last_seen FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name = 'argocd_app_orphaned_resources_count' AND p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes' GROUP BY name, namespace, project HAVING SUM(data_point_value) > 0 ORDER BY orphaned_resources DESC

tiles.title: Top Sync Activity by App
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT name, project, phase, MAX(data_point_value) AS sync_total, MAX(p_timestamp) AS last_seen FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name = 'argocd_app_sync_total' AND p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes' GROUP BY name, project, phase ORDER BY sync_total DESC LIMIT 25

tiles.title: Kubectl Requests by Method
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(method, 'unknown') AS method, SUM(data_point_value) AS requests FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name = 'argocd_kubectl_requests_total' AND p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes' GROUP BY method ORDER BY requests DESC

tiles.title: Redis Requests by Initiator
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(initiator, 'unknown') AS initiator, SUM(data_point_value) AS requests FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name = 'argocd_redis_request_total' AND p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes' GROUP BY initiator ORDER BY requests DESC LIMIT 20

tiles.title: Redis Failures
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT hostname, initiator, failed, MAX(data_point_value) AS requests, MAX(p_timestamp) AS last_seen FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name = 'argocd_redis_request_total' AND failed = 'true' AND p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '10 minutes' GROUP BY hostname, initiator, failed ORDER BY requests DESC

tiles.title: Argo CD Metric Inventory
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT metric_name, COUNT(*) AS rows, MIN(p_timestamp) AS first_seen, MAX(p_timestamp) AS last_seen FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name LIKE 'argocd%' GROUP BY metric_name ORDER BY rows DESC

tiles.title: Argo CD Scrape Targets
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT "service.name" AS service_name, "service.instance.id" AS service_instance_id, "k8s.pod.name" AS pod, COUNT(DISTINCT metric_name) AS metrics, MAX(p_timestamp) AS last_seen FROM $metrics_dataset WHERE metric_name LIKE 'argocd%' GROUP BY "service.name", "service.instance.id", "k8s.pod.name" ORDER BY metrics DESC

tiles.title: Argo CD Log Events
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM $logs_dataset WHERE p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' AND "k8s.namespace.name" = 'argocd'

tiles.title: Argo CD Error Logs
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM $logs_dataset WHERE p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' AND "k8s.namespace.name" = 'argocd' AND (LOWER(body) LIKE '%error%' OR LOWER(body) LIKE '%failed%' OR LOWER(body) LIKE '%panic%' OR LOWER(severity_text) LIKE '%error%')

tiles.title: Argo CD Logs Over Time
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT date_bin(INTERVAL '1 minute', p_timestamp, TIMESTAMP '1970-01-01T00:00:00') AS time_bucket, COUNT(*) AS value FROM $logs_dataset WHERE p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' AND "k8s.namespace.name" = 'argocd' GROUP BY time_bucket ORDER BY time_bucket

tiles.title: Argo CD Logs by Component
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE("k8s.container.name", 'unknown') AS component, COUNT(*) AS logs FROM $logs_dataset WHERE p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' AND "k8s.namespace.name" = 'argocd' GROUP BY component ORDER BY logs DESC

tiles.title: Argo CD Logs by Severity
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT COALESCE(severity_text, 'unknown') AS severity, COUNT(*) AS logs FROM $logs_dataset WHERE p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' AND "k8s.namespace.name" = 'argocd' GROUP BY severity ORDER BY logs DESC

tiles.title: Recent Argo CD Error Logs
tiles.chartQuery: SELECT p_timestamp, "k8s.container.name" AS component, "k8s.pod.name" AS pod, severity_text, body FROM $logs_dataset WHERE p_timestamp >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' AND "k8s.namespace.name" = 'argocd' AND (LOWER(body) LIKE '%error%' OR LOWER(body) LIKE '%failed%' OR LOWER(body) LIKE '%panic%' OR LOWER(severity_text) LIKE '%error%') ORDER BY p_timestamp DESC LIMIT 50
